description: tuppr — Talos & Kubernetes upgrade operator. Tracks upgrade phases, node progress, durations, health checks, hooks, and maintenance windows.

panels.description: Active Talos upgrade jobs.

panels.description: Active Kubernetes upgrade jobs.

panels.description: Current phase of each Talos upgrade. One row per upgrade; cell value is the active phase.

panels.description: Per-node job durations and outcomes for recent runs.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (upgrade_type, upgrade_name, node_name, result, le) (rate(tuppr_upgrade_job_duration_seconds_bucket[$__range])))

panels.title: Per-node job durations (range p95)

panels.description: Total hook executions over the dashboard time range, by result.

panels.description: Hook executions broken down per upgrade and hook name.
panels.title: Hook activity (range)

panels.description: Whether each upgrade is currently inside its maintenance window.
panels.title: Maintenance windows over time

panels.description: When each upgrade's next maintenance window opens (when currently outside).
panels.title: Maintenance window status

title: tuppr — Talos & Kubernetes upgrades
